features.title: Open Source
features.description: Developer and maintainer of easy-web (Astro component library) and FeatureAdmin (SharePoint tool). Contributing to open source projects on GitHub.

features.title: Community & Engagement
features.description: Volunteer support for sports clubs and non-profit organizations. Website maintenance and Microsoft 365 administration.

features.title: Web Engineering
features.description: Modern web stacks with Astro, TypeScript and Azure. CI/CD pipelines, Static Web Apps and software architecture for scalable web ecosystems.
